dialogueLines.dialogueText: Howdy Duke! You got this! Give those bosses hell!
Your first opponent is Drover!
Aww, I hate going against him, his hogs are so cute.
Though, not as much as the best boy Tator!
That was amazing, Duke! That swine swindler didn’t know what was coming
I think that miner Julius is your next foe! Send that senior back to the retirement home!
Though, try not to mention his boss in front of him.
You didn’t hear it from me, but she kind of… dumped him… and he’s still torn about it.
That was a crazy fight out there Duke!
Hopefully now that he’s defeated, Julius and Granny have the time to do couples counseling.
Nevermind about that, you’re facing off against that Magician Couple Ace and Mirage!
They’re such an adorable couple, even when they are committing fraud and aggravated assault!
Great job! I guess the power of love really can’t conquer all!
Alright, last one before Granny is the botanist Ash!
I can’t lie, this one is personal for me: I love flowers and Ash just burns them down.
May Ash face eternal damnation fueled by fires tenfold hotter than the one she burns.
.... Uhh, I mean, go Duke!
Alright Duke, one more to go!
You’re the bravest among us Duke! I’m so honored to have served with you.
Hero’s Haven was always more than a bar to me, but a home, a family.
Thank you for defending my— OUR home and family.
Tator and I send our best wishes.
We did it… we really did it!
I never thought I would see this day come! Spectacular job Duke!
You’re one of a kind! You deserve a very nice rest!
